LParameters llSeek

ThisForm.LockScreen = .T.
llSeek = Iif(Type('llSeek') = 'L',llSeek,.F.)
If Used('CsSigCqChi')
	UpDate CsSigCqChi Set nMarca1s = 0 Where nMarca1s = 1
EndIf

If Empty(ThisForm.getCdContas.Value)
	Select CsSigCqChi
	Set Order To NCopias
	If llSeek
		Seek Chr(255) In CsSigCqChi Order NCopias Ascending
	EndIf
Else
	Select CsSigCqChi
	Set Order To contas
	Set Key To ThisForm.getCdContas.Value
	If llSeek
		Seek ThisForm.getCdContas.Value + Chr(255) In CsSigCqChi Order contas Ascendi... [TRUNCADO]

Lparameters llPosiciona

Private lcDtInicial, lcDtFinal

ThisForm.LockScreen = .T.

If llPosiciona
	lcBusca = csSigCqChi.Bancos + CsSigCqChi.Agencias + CsSigCqChi.ncontas + CsSigCqChi.Ncheques
EndIf

lcDtInicial = fDtoSQL(ThisForm.Dt_Inicial.Value)
lcDtFinal   = fDtoSQL(ThisForm.Dt_Final.Value,'23:59:59')
lcCdGrupo   = ThisForm.getCdGrupos.Value
lcCdConta   = ThisForm.getCdContas.Value

Wait Window 'Aguarde! Selecionando Cheques...' NoWait

	ThisForm.GrdCCheques.RecordSourc... [TRUNCADO]

Local lcKeyChq1,lnRecno1

If InList(m.nKeyCode,13,32)
	lnRecno1  = RecNo('CsSigCqChi')
	lcKeyChq1 = (CsSigCqChi.bancos + CsSigCqChi.agencias + CsSigCqChi.ncontas + CsSigCqChi.ncheques)
	
	UpDate CsSigCqChi Set nMarca1s = Iif(nMarca1s = 1,0,1) ;
	Where bancos + agencias + ncontas + ncheques = lcKeyChq1 And nEmitidos = 0 And nCancelas = 0
	
	ThisForm.GrdCCheques.Refresh
	If BetWeen(m.lnRecno1,1,RecCount('CsSigCqChi'))
		GoTo lnRecno1
	EndIf
	NoDefault
EndIf
NoDefault
Return(.F.)

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: UpDate CsSigCqChi Set nMarca1s = 0 Where nMarca1s = 1
UpDate CsSigCqChi Set nMarca1s = Iif(nMarca1s = 1,0,1) ; 	Where bancos + agencias + ncontas + ncheques = lcKeyChq1 And nEmitidos = 0 And nCancelas = 0
Select Distinct Bancos ; From csSigCqChi ; Where nMarca1s = 1 ; Into Cursor TmpChi
Select bancos,valors,ncheques,datas,nemitidos,ncancelas,favos From CsSigCqChi ; 	Where nMarca1s = 1 ; 	Orde... [TRUNCADO]
lStrQuery = [Delete From SigCqChi Where cidchaves = ']+CsSigCqChi.cidchaves+[' ] 		lnQueryOk = ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lStrQuery,'')
UpDate CsSigCqChi Set nMarca1s = 0 Where nMarca1s = 1
